Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I thought about following Nyx-sama to see if I could get my family back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}But that wouldn't have helped. It was my fault, sticking with this job and ignoring them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 416}I'm thinking about going to see my wife and trying to patch things up with her.[n]{f 1 1}
